description_long: This is a rugged, cylindrical duffel-style backpack with a weathered green fabric body and brown leather-like accents on the base, top flap, and corners. The main compartment is accessed via a large flap at the top, secured by a strap, and the bag features a single, wide, padded shoulder strap for carrying. There are two small external pockets on one side, likely for quick-access items, and a rectangular patch with faint text on the front. The surface appears worn and slightly dirty, suggesting heavy use or outdoor activity. The overall construction looks sturdy, with reinforced stitching and durable materials. No visible zippers or decorative elements are present, giving it a utilitarian, military-inspired appearance.
description: A rugged, cylindrical green and brown duffel-style backpack with a single wide strap, external pockets, and a weathered, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the cylindrical shape, wide shoulder strap, and brown leather-like accents on the base and top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the front patch, main body, and the full length of the single strap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing two small external pockets and the weathered green fabric.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the top flap, brown accent, and the attachment of the strap.
attribute_strap_design: Single wide, padded shoulder strap, attached diagonally from top to bottom, no visible adjusters or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: Two small external pockets on one side, one main top-loading compartment under the flap.
